# GarvinLabs

> Conversion optimization for businesses losing customers to bad funnels.

GarvinLabs is a conversion optimization service run by Garvin Chanderia, based in Pune, India. We help businesses convert more of the traffic they're already paying for by fixing their conversion flow — landing page audits, funnel fixes, and CTA rewrites delivered in 5-10 days.

## Services

- [Conversion Audit](https://garvinlabs.vercel.app/#packages): PDF audit report of your landing page — top 5-7 conversion issues identified with exact fixes. ₹5K-₹10K, delivered in 1-2 days.
- [Conversion Sprint](https://garvinlabs.vercel.app/#packages): Full audit plus implementation — headlines rewritten, CTAs rebuilt, social proof optimized. ₹25K-₹50K, delivered in 5-7 days.
- [Conversion System Sprint](https://garvinlabs.vercel.app/#packages): Complete conversion flow redesign — multi-page funnel optimization, trust architecture, objection handling. ₹50K-₹75K, delivered in 7-10 days.

## Ideal Clients

- Coaches and consultants running ads but not converting
- Clinics and service businesses with brochure-style websites
- D2C brands and e-commerce stores with high cart abandonment

## Process

1. Send your landing page URL via WhatsApp or email
2. I audit your page against 7 conversion areas (headline, CTA, social proof, messaging, UX, value prop, conversion killers)
3. You receive a detailed PDF report with every issue and the exact fix
4. Same traffic, more customers

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +91 93562 49535
- Email: labs.garvin@gmail.com
- Website: https://garvinlabs.vercel.app

## About

Garvin Chanderia is a conversion optimization specialist based in Pune, India. Background in computer science (B.Tech, AI/ML), nearly two years as a Business Analyst at a Fortune 500 manufacturer. Has audited 938 pages in a single project, built products with 300+ organic downloads, and conducted 200+ user interviews.
